description: Thursday 17 July 2025 | Foreign Affairs, Defence and Trade Committee Briefing on meetings with representative counterparts and government officials Hearing of evidence: French Senate Delegation Senator Philippe Folliot Senator Sebastian Pla
descriptionSummary: Briefing on meetings with representative counterparts and government officials. French Senate Delegation. Senator Philippe Folliot

chunks.text: Two French senators who have come to visit New Zealand. Um, we will hand over to you for introductions in a moment. And one last word, uh, I want to say that in France, when it comes to defense at the moment, we have a consensus. 'cause apart from the far right and the far left, all the political forces in the country are willing to work together towards a common goal, which is the developing, uh, defense force, uh, in, um, yeah, in order to develop, uh, France, uh, defense capacities.

Well, thank you very much and I would happily talk all day on issues and on many other issues, but I know we are all busy, so we will have to alize up there. That was interesting. But I do just want to say that we have a lot of shared values and it's easy to have values when they are not under pressure.

It's much harder to maintain those values when they are tested. And that is exactly what is happening now. And so it is vital that countries like New Zealand and France that share these values must step up and do everything that they can to uphold those ideals that are so important for us globally.
So thank you very much again for taking the time to come for meeting with our.
